title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an Anthropic tool that enables users to create prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. The tutorial demonstrates generating fully functional landing pages and UI components in minutes using a single prompt, with outputs available as downloadable code.
